title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Municipal Mayor Caesar P. Perez to Enter and Sign Into an Agreement/deed of Sale in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños for the Acquisition of a Parcel of Land Covering an Area of One Thousand Sixty-eight Square Meters (1,068 SQ. M.) Located at Barangay Bayog, Los Baños, Laguna As Site for the Construction of an Evacuation Center. (AUTHOR: HON. JANOS S. LAPIZ, 09/14/2020)
